voyages.name: The Mayflower
voyages.summary: 102 Pilgrims crossed the North Atlantic in 66 days to found Plymouth Colony.

voyages.name: Columbus's first voyage
voyages.fromName: San Sebastián de la Gomera, Canary Islands
voyages.summary: Three ships sailed west from the Canaries, making landfall in the Bahamas five weeks later.

voyages.name: Magellan-Elcano expedition
voyages.summary: The first leg of the voyage that became the first circumnavigation of the globe.

voyages.name: Vasco da Gama's voyage to India
voyages.toName: Cape of Good Hope, South Africa
voyages.summary: First leg of the voyage that opened a sea route from Europe to India.

voyages.name: Pedro Álvares Cabral's voyage
voyages.summary: A wide Atlantic arc intended for India instead reached Brazil first.

voyages.name: HMS Beagle (Darwin's voyage)
voyages.summary: The first Atlantic leg of the survey voyage that shaped Darwin's theory of evolution.

voyages.name: The Kon-Tiki expedition
voyages.summary: A balsa-wood raft drifted across the Pacific to test a theory of Polynesian settlement.

voyages.name: The First Fleet
voyages.summary: Eleven ships carried the first European settlers and convicts to Australia.

voyages.name: Leif Erikson's voyage to Vinland
voyages.summary: Norse explorers reached North America five centuries before Columbus.

voyages.name: Zheng He's treasure voyages
voyages.summary: A Ming-dynasty treasure fleet of hundreds of ships reached the East African coast.

voyages.name: Captain Cook's first voyage
voyages.summary: Sailed to observe the transit of Venus, then charted New Zealand and eastern Australia.

voyages.name: Shackleton's boat journey
voyages.summary: A 1,300km lifeboat voyage through the Southern Ocean to save his stranded crew.

voyages.name: Francis Drake's circumnavigation (Pacific leg)
voyages.summary: After raiding the Pacific coast of South America, Drake struck out across the ocean toward Asia.

voyages.name: The Manila Galleon route
voyages.summary: For 250 years, galleons crossed the Pacific each year carrying silver and silk.

voyages.name: Scott's Terra Nova expedition
voyages.summary: The ill-fated expedition to reach the South Pole set out from New Zealand across the Southern Ocean.
